description: Query Kubernetes resources — list pods with restart counts and OOMKilled state, list events, get logs, describe resources, inspect deployment resource limits.

tools.name: list_pods
tools.description: List pods in a namespace with full status: restarts, phase, age, and OOMKilled/termination info.
tools.returns: Tabular list: NAME, READY, STATUS, RESTARTS, AGE, LAST-TERMINATION
tools.whenToUse: Use to find crash-looping pods, OOMKilled pods, or pods with high restart counts.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when you need detailed pod specs or logs.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List Kubernetes events in a namespace, sorted by most recent first.
tools.returns: Tabular list: LAST-SEEN, TYPE, REASON, OBJECT, COUNT, MESSAGE
tools.whenToUse: Use to find OOMKilled, CrashLoopBackOff, BackOff, Killing, or FailedScheduling events.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for pods in namespaces outside the allowlist.

tools.name: get_pod_logs
tools.description: Get recent logs from a specific pod.

parameters.name: tail_lines
parameters.description: Number of log lines to retrieve (max 200).

tools.whenToUse: Use for troubleshooting, error investigation, or checking application output.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for pods in namespaces outside the allowlist.

tools.name: describe_deployment
tools.description: Describe a Deployment including container resource requests and limits.
tools.returns: Deployment details including replicas, image, and per-container resource requests/limits.
tools.whenToUse: Use to inspect memory/CPU limits when diagnosing OOMKilled pods.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for resources outside allowed namespaces.

tools.name: kubectl_get
tools.description: Get a summary of Kubernetes resources of a given type.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Plural resource type, e.g. pods, services, deployments, nodes.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Namespace for namespaced resources. Ignored for cluster-scoped resources.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional specific resource name. If omitted, lists all resources of the type.

tools.returns: Resource summary or a single resource detail.
tools.whenToUse: Use to inspect deployments, services, nodes, events, or other safe resource types.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for secrets, serviceaccounts, roles, rolebindings, clusterroles, clusterrolebindings.

tools.name: kubectl_describe
tools.description: Describe a Kubernetes resource in detail — full spec, status, and metadata.
tools.returns: Detailed resource description with full spec and status.
tools.whenToUse: Use when you need events, conditions, or full metadata for debugging.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for blocked resource types or resources outside allowed namespaces.
